title: Remove Python/numpy/scipy/ALSA from default image (audio not wired up)
description: Dockerfile installs numpy, scipy (200MB), pulseaudio, alsa-utils but CMD runs `dist/http-server.js` which has no audio path. setup-audio.sh and wake_word_detector.py are not in CMD. Either wire up the speech path properly, or remove the bloat from the default image. Recommendation: remove from default image (can add via speech compose override).
validation: Read Dockerfile, confirm numpy/scipy/pulseaudio/alsa-utils removed from default image. Speech compose still works via override.
